title: festuca arenaria var. sabulicola
intro: Festuca arenaria var. sabulicola, also known as coastal bent grass, is a type of perennial grass native to coastal regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Festuca arenaria var. sabulicola is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
